case_title: FLORENTINO CERDA VS. ANTONIO GUTIERREZ HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CERDA, FLORENTINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANTONIO GUTIERREZ $9,368.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,483.00, DEFENDANT ANTONIO GUTIERREZ HERNANDEZ SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF FLORENTINO CERDA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CERDA, FLORENTINO AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANTONIO GUTIERREZ RIVERA, LOURDES

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,368.00 FILED BY CERDA, FLORENTINO AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANTONIO GUTIERREZ RIVERA, LOURDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANTONIO GUTIERREZ RIVERA, LOURDES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED FEB-11-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, LOURDES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF FLORENTINO CERDA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTONIO GUTIERREZ HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER JEAN GARASCIA. DEFENDANT LORDES RIVERA IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT RIVERA WAS FILED UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT RIVERA WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ANTONIO GUTIERREZ
